title: CGSOS Time Table 2026 - Download Chhattisgarh State Open School Exam Date Sheet PDF

detail.title: CGSOS Time Table 2026 - Download Chhattisgarh State Open School Exam Date Sheet PDF
detail.short_info: Chhattisgarh State Open School has released the Class 10th and 12th. Students can access their CGSOS Result 2026 using their registration number through the direct link here.

sections.heading: CGSOS Time Table 2026 - Download Chhattisgarh State Open School Exam Date Sheet PDF

content.text: Quick Summary: CGSOS Time Table 2026 has been released for Class 10th and 12th board examinations. Students can download the detailed exam schedule from the official website. Exams will be conducted in a single morning shift. Check subject-wise dates, timings, and guidelines below.

rows: Class 10: March 17 – April 7, 2026 Class 12: March 16 – April 8, 2026

sections.heading: Download CGSOS Time Table 2026 - Direct Links
Latest Updates on CGSOS Time Table 2026

items: CGSOS Time Table 2026 released on January 20, 2026
Separate schedules for Class 10th and 12th examinations
All exams in single morning shift (8:30 AM to 11:45 AM)
Admit cards to be released soon on official website
Students must reach exam centre by 8:30 AM

content.text: The CGSOS Time Table 2026 is the official examination schedule released by Chhattisgarh State Open School for Class 10th and 12th annual exams. It includes:

items: Subject-wise exam dates
Exam timings and duration
Important instructions for candidates
Guidelines on admit card and entry

content.text: Students must download and follow the schedule for effective preparation.

sections.heading: How to Download CGSOS Time Table 2026? (Step-by-Step)
Method 1: Direct Download from Official Website

items: Visit Official Website: Go to sos.cg.nic.in
Navigate to Notices/Examination Section: Look for “Examination” or “Notifications”
Click on Time Table Link: Find “Class 10/12 Exam Schedule 2026”
Select Your Class: Choose Class 10th or 12th
Download PDF: Click to save the date sheet
Save and Print: Take a printout for reference

content.text: Visit the official website link above for the latest PDF.

sections.heading: CGSOS Time Table 2026 - Class Wise Details

items: Download and verify your CGSOS Time Table 2026
Download admit card from official website
Reach exam centre by 8:30 AM
Carry admit card and valid ID proof
Question paper distribution at 8:40 AM
Admit Card (mandatory)
Valid Photo ID Proof
Stationery (blue/black pen)
